title: RXB-Kit
description: Lightweight 16x16 building mod. Also nuclear power!
body:
As a builder, I’ve created this mod to help myself in my creative endeavours. It’s meant to be pretty lightweight and unintrusive for the most part, simply just adding more blocks that can help with building and decorating.

While the mod was mainly made for creative use, all blocks can be obtained in survival.

Hope you enjoy, and happy building!

## Content

**The mod is split into different content packs. These add a bunch of blocks and assets related to the theme of that specific pack.**

### Nuclear Pack

Contains various blocks for the construction of a working nuclear-inspired power plant. These can be obtained by opening nuclear crates.

### School Pack

Contains various props that would commonly be found in schools.

### Classic Pack

A collection of wooden blocks, furniture and more.

*Icon by Rumi <3!*
